svg.text: Incoming requests → client list → client detail → edit → return or submit

g.text: ① Pending requests + active client list
"Hi Rohit, please review my FY 2024-25 filing. I have a few questions about Section 80C…"
Used your invite code CA-7K3PQX · 30 min ago
+ 5 more clients · click any row to open detail
② Client detail — one-click from list or notification
Mumbai · Grant: directory_request · review_edit · FY 2024-25 · activated 5 May 2026
15 of 47 still unverified · Ready to add 80C deductions Asha missed
↩ Return to Asha for her review & submission →
③ review_edit mode — return filing to taxpayer
In review_edit mode, you cannot submit. Only the taxpayer can. Send them your change-set with notes.
Hi Asha — I categorized your Birla MF and LIC payments under
the diff and submit when you're comfortable. The new regime
⚠ Submission authority stays with the taxpayer (review_edit · access_mode)
filing_change_sets row inserted · filing.status = revision_returned · notif consultant_returned_filing sent
✓ Returned · Asha will see the diff in her notifications and decide.
④ full_access mode — CA submits on taxpayer's behalf
⚠ Submitting as: Rajesh Patel · LMNOP1234C · full_access grant
✓ Grant still active · not revoked by taxpayer
In full_access, you can submit the return without the taxpayer's involvement.
The submission is recorded with submitted_by_user_id = your user_id.
Enter the 6-digit code we sent to YOUR phone
I confirm I am authorized by Rajesh Patel to submit this filing.
submitted_by_user_id = ca user · audit-logged · taxpayer notified consultant_submitted_filing
⑤ Your activity log — visible to the client too (by design · trust transparency)
My actions on Asha Verma's filings
Same view available to Asha — full transparency. Every read and write logged with actor_role='consultant'.
audit_logs is append-only (DB trigger blocks UPDATE / DELETE). Same activity is visible in Asha's /audit page.
Notifications you received during this engagement
consultant_access_request ← Asha sent the directory request
consultant_rule_change_impact ← Section 80C rule v2 came out (4 of your clients affected)
